entries.name: Foundation Guard Set
entries.description: Runs the registered targeted foundation guard set; a pass is static scoped evidence only.

entries.name: Journey Guard Set
entries.description: Runs the registered targeted journey guard set; full and runtime modes require explicit commands and never imply final closure.

entries.name: UI Kit Boundary Gate
entries.description: Statically enforces reusable UI ownership and boundary rules.

entries.name: Fullstack Boundary Gate
entries.description: Statically enforces declared frontend, backend, contract, and ownership boundaries.

entries.name: WLT Financial Boundary Gate
entries.description: Statically enforces WLT ownership of financial truth and forbids duplicate DSH financial mutation.

entries.name: Runtime Configuration Gate
entries.description: Validates runtime configuration ownership and safe defaults; it does not prove a runtime executed.

entries.name: No Broken Imports Gate
entries.description: Statically verifies supported imports resolve to existing repository modules.

entries.name: Cleanup Policy Gate
entries.description: Rejects forbidden local roots, retired labels, deprecated guards, and transient or fake truth patterns in governed scopes.

entries.name: API Contract Binding Gate
entries.description: Statically validates OpenAPI and generated-client contract compatibility.

entries.name: Backend API Binding Gate
entries.description: Statically reconciles supported backend route registrations with API contracts.

entries.name: Service Manifest Drift Gate
entries.description: Statically validates canonical DSH capability ownership and contract-operation coverage without duplicating manifest truth.

entries.name: Frontend Static Binding Gate
entries.description: Proves declared static screen-to-controller-to-contract-to-route-to-capability reachability only.

entries.name: Required Command Integrity Gate
entries.description: Rejects required guards, tests, visual checks, and performance checks that swallow failures or target an invalid host runtime endpoint.

entries.name: Go Route AST Gate
entries.description: Extracts supported Go route registrations from source AST; it does not prove endpoint reachability.

entries.name: Static Logic Heuristic Gate
entries.description: Rejects selected dead-action and local-stub patterns without claiming complete behavioral coverage.

entries.name: Static Accessibility Gate
entries.description: Checks selected static accessibility contracts; runtime assistive-technology behavior remains separate.

entries.name: Dependency Graph Gate
entries.description: Statically validates configured dependency layering and prohibited cycles.

entries.name: AST Structural Rules Gate
entries.description: Applies registered structural source rules using AST matching.

entries.name: UI Provider Required Gate
entries.description: Statically requires configured UI provider composition.

entries.name: Icon Contract Gate
entries.description: Statically enforces icon ownership and usage contracts.

entries.name: Design Token Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports configured design-token and spacing anomalies without owning visual acceptance.

entries.name: Brand Identity Diagnostics
entries.description: Generates a bounded static brand-identity report; it is not a visual approval gate.

entries.name: Repository Size Gate
entries.description: Rejects configured forbidden tracked outputs and oversized repository artifacts.

entries.name: Repository Naming Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports naming-policy drift while registered legacy exceptions remain.

entries.name: Repository Structure Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports configured directory depth and structural-policy drift.

entries.name: Heavy Import Gate
entries.description: Rejects configured prohibited heavy imports in governed source scopes.

entries.name: Performance Budget Configuration Gate
entries.description: Validates budget definitions only; measured runtime performance requires benchmarks.

entries.name: Bundle Budget Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports configured bundle-size and dependency budget drift.

entries.name: Governance Contract Gate
entries.description: Validates registered governance schemas and cross-registry invariants.

entries.name: Agent and Skill Governance Gate
entries.description: Validates active governed skills, retired legacy skills, dependencies, routing, agent roles, and authority separation.

entries.name: Authority Separation Gate
entries.description: Enforces complete SDLC roles, advisory-only supervision, independent governance and CI skills, distinct approval owners, and forward stage ownership.

entries.name: SaaS Governance Gate
entries.description: Validates SaaS readiness state, tenant-governance constraints, deferred commercial policy, canonical decisions, and activation evidence boundaries.

entries.name: Guard Registry and CI Policy Gate
entries.description: Validates guard registration, package commands, fail-closed runners, workflow policy, permissions, and immutable action references.

entries.name: SDLC Contract Gate
entries.description: Validates SDLC schemas, lifecycle vocabulary, impact routing, approvals, and supplied transition artifacts without granting a stage pass itself.

entries.name: Markdown Governance Gate
entries.description: Fails on Markdown contract and style violations in active governance and GitHub documentation.

entries.name: Secrets Detection Gate
entries.description: Fails on configured exposed secret, key, token, or credential patterns using redacted output.

entries.name: Tool Catalog Coverage Gate
entries.description: Validates tool catalog schema, IDs, and cross-file registration.

entries.name: Toolchain Activation Gate
entries.description: Validates catalog, baseline, scripts, workflows, and activation-state consistency.

entries.name: OSS Toolchain Policy Gate
entries.description: Enforces registered open-source and free-tool metadata policy.

entries.name: Workflow Syntax Gate
entries.description: Fails on GitHub Actions workflow syntax errors detected by actionlint.

entries.name: Workflow Static Security Gate
entries.description: Fails on configured high-confidence high-severity GitHub Actions findings detected by zizmor.

entries.name: Actions Immutable Pinning Gate
entries.description: Fails when external GitHub Actions are not pinned to immutable commit SHAs.

entries.name: Rego Policy Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports Rego style and quality findings while the lint baseline remains diagnostic.

entries.name: OPA Policy Gate
entries.description: Runs registered Conftest and OPA policy checks against governance inputs.

entries.name: Shell Script Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports ShellCheck findings while the shell baseline remains diagnostic.

entries.name: Dockerfile Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports hadolint findings while the Dockerfile baseline remains diagnostic.

entries.name: YAML Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports YAML formatting findings while the formatting baseline remains diagnostic.

entries.name: Accessibility Runtime Gate
entries.description: Runs Playwright and axe runtime accessibility checks and propagates missing-runtime or test failure.

entries.name: Repository Naming Diagnostics
entries.description: Reports ls-lint naming findings while registered legacy names remain.

entries.name: Runtime-Facing Static Anti-Stub Gate
entries.description: Rejects selected fake, preview, placeholder, and in-memory success patterns in runtime-facing source; it does not prove runtime execution.

entries.name: Cross-Journey Regression Gate
entries.description: Enforces selected named cross-journey regression invariants without claiming complete runtime coverage.
